claims.check: all six governed integration-unit commits remain ancestors of stable main and local HEAD equals origin/main
claims.replay_command: for c in 81af2bb2b95ef8919c863cc927d40d2c69627be6 ded1f6bac09423398bb473a645debd1bf61c9474 55b7d922a4330adc195bbf16b5616e5730e22da2 9fcb7229fc4b3774f55ff4c708446f5f5b2d44e9 b4101667bdd75be22bfd21376e219f091b3842c4 a732c339d081d6810e7f616a888528f17f1997e4; do git merge-base --is-ancestor "$c" HEAD || exit 1; done; git rev-parse HEAD origin/main
claims.source_command: git merge-base --is-ancestor for the six governed unit commits; git rev-parse HEAD origin/main

claims.check: the correction set contains exactly the four intended tracked files
repository verify, lint, action workflow lint, and whitespace checks pass
claims.replay_command: pnpm verify; pnpm lint; pnpm exec github-actionlint .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/release.yml; git diff --check
claims.source_command: pnpm verify; pnpm lint; pnpm exec github-actionlint .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/release.yml; git diff --check
claims.threshold: verify_exit == 0 and lint_exit == 0 and actionlint_exit == 0 and diff_check_exit == 0

claims.check: the exact sdk-mcp and managed-provider public source/docs/skill scan has zero diagnostics
claims.replay_command: node pkg/tool/lint/dist/cli.mjs --json --max-warnings 0 pkg/sdk/mcp/src pkg/sdk/claude/src pkg/sdk/codex/src pkg/sdk/mcp/README.md pkg/sdk/claude/README.md pkg/sdk/codex/README.md skills/pumped-fn
claims.source_command: node pkg/tool/lint/dist/cli.mjs --json --max-warnings 0 pkg/sdk/mcp/src pkg/sdk/claude/src pkg/sdk/codex/src pkg/sdk/mcp/README.md pkg/sdk/claude/README.md pkg/sdk/codex/README.md skills/pumped-fn

claims.check: CI and release carry identical Run tests timeout, workspace concurrency, and failure-diagnostic blocks
claims.replay_command: diff -u <(sed -n '/      - name: Run tests/,/      - name: Run comparison browser smoke/p' .github/workflows/ci.yml) <(sed -n '/      - name: Run tests/,/      - name: Run comparison browser smoke/p' .github/workflows/release.yml)
claims.source_command: diff of sed-extracted Run tests through Run comparison browser smoke blocks

claims.check: focused fixtures pass for direct, alias, and namespace resource positives plus fake atom, non-boundary config, outside-factory, and nested-creator negatives
claims.replay_command: pnpm -F @pumped-fn/lite-lint exec vitest run tests/scanner.test.ts -t "explicitly owned boundary|outside the boundary factory"

claims.check: no integrated unit is lost or duplicated by the four-file correction
claims.replay_command: for each governed unit commit: git merge-base --is-ancestor COMMIT HEAD; git status --porcelain --untracked-files=no
claims.source_command: six commit ancestor loop plus bounded tracked status

claims.check: required correction gates have no failure or unresolved deterministic blocker
claims.replay_command: pnpm verify; pnpm lint; node exact scoped lint; pnpm exec github-actionlint workflows; git diff --check; focused vitest
claims.source_command: repository required gates and focused correction checks

claims.check: the correction matches the public SDK lint contract and nearest-creator factory-only boundary semantics
claims.replay_command: node exact scoped lint; focused scanner vitest; workflow block diff
claims.source_command: exact scoped SDK lint, focused scanner fixtures, workflow block diff

claims.check: validator stayed inside read-test plus governed-report authority and introduced no unexpected tracked path
claims.source_command: bounded tracked status and validator command ledger

claims.check: append-only OKRA run store verifies before governed report append and no model narrative is used as sole completion proof
